name: cicd
description: Unified CI/CD troubleshooting and pipeline configuration for GitHub Actions, Docker, GHCR, and self-hosted runners (both systemd-on-host and containerized via myoung34/github-runner — covers CMD-herdado-zerado, env LABELS vs RUNNER_LABELS, EPHEMERAL+restart loop, gpg --dearmor em buildkit, deploy keys per-repo unique e .env leading whitespace).
